title: About Color machine
introduction: Color Machine is a collection of simple, powerful tools designed to make working with color easier, faster, and more inspiring.
sections: Whether you're a designer, developer, or just exploring creative ideas, Color Machine helps you generate colors, build palettes, and make confident design decisions without overthinking the process.

The platform includes a range of color-focused tools — from random color generators and category-based color inspiration to palette creation and contrast checking. Each tool is built to be intuitive, practical, and easy to use whenever you need a quick spark or a reliable solution.
Color plays a huge role in how we experience design. With Color Machine, the goal is to remove friction and make it easier to explore, experiment, and find combinations that work.
